description: 51 - 18-11-2024 - Email between Peter Mandelson and Katie Martin (former Chief of Staff_to the Chancellor of the Exchequer, HMT)

participants.name: Email between Peter Mandelson and Katie Martin
participants.role: former Chief of Staff_to the Chancellor of the Exchequer

text:
Staff_to the Chancellor of the Exchequer, HMT)

From: Peter Mandelson Personal
Sent: 18 November 2024 11:21

To: Martin, Katie - HMT

Cc: JCS - HMT; Diary

Subject: Re: Meeting with Rachel

| realise | am going to be back in London at around 3 30 today. Happy to visit after.

Sent from my iPhone

On 18 Nov 2024, at 09:12, Martin, Katie - HMT Personal wrote:

Hi Peter- good to see you briefly on Friday night.

Rachel’s keen to have a chat about trade before a meeting she’s having late morning tomorrow.

Is there any chance you could pop in either late PM today or early tomorrow morning? If not a
phone call is fine.

cc’ing JCS who can help with exact timings.
Best,

Katie

Katie Martin | Chief of Staff to the Chancellor

HM Treasury | 1 Horse Guards Road, London, SW1A 2HQ
m: Personal

www.gov.uk/hm-treasury | Twitter: @hmtreasury

171
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.

messages.subject: Meeting with Rachel
messages.body:
| realise | am going to be back in London at around 3 30 today. Happy to visit after.

Sent from my iPhone

Hi Peter- good to see you briefly on Friday night.

Rachel’s keen to have a chat about trade before a meeting she’s having late morning tomorrow.

Is there any chance you could pop in either late PM today or early tomorrow morning? If not a
phone call is fine.

cc’ing JCS who can help with exact timings.
Best,

Katie

Katie Martin | Chief of Staff to the Chancellor

HM Treasury | 1 Horse Guards Road, London, SW1A 2HQ
m: Personal
